options.a: To engage or disengage the autopilot, set different modes, and choose between armed modes and engaged modes.
options.b: To extract information stored in or processed by the FMS and load new or updated information into the FMS.
options.c: To engage the alignment procedure for the INS/IRS and to switch between NAV mode and ATT mode.
options.d: To engage or disengage the aircraft APU and monitor its status.
